channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Potholes, 3rd March
item.description:
Potholes

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50-76, Mackenzie Road, Barnsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car parked on street with obscured number plate, 3rd March
item.description:
This car is frequently parked with either the number plates removed, or a cover on which completely obscures the number plates.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Osterley Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Re-opening loud drain, 3rd March
item.description:
Bexley closed after accessing it is within tolerance. It has woken me up and my property is set back. Please re-open 8722709.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 245, Main Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken pavement pedestrian fence, 3rd March
item.description:
Broken pavement, it is impossible to take the wheelchair over the pedestrian fence, you have to go out onto the street where the cars pass, very dangerous to maneuver. and access to the homes is also full of gaps and gaps.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Great Dover Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Red Peugeot with taped over plates, 3rd March
item.description:
A red Peugeot is parked on the street with its plates taped over

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Walford Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Another Abandoned White Van, 3rd March
item.description:
There are two white vans currently parked on the street. One is missing number plates, and the other has it's plates taped over.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Walford Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Redundant sign post, 3rd March
item.description:
Sign post with no sign or lantern E159 Been redundant since before 2008
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Nelgarde Road, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned van with no number plates, 3rd March
item.description:
Multiple vehicles on the street are missing number plates or have been taped over

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Walford Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 3rd March
item.description:
As title, blocking pavement access. Not sure how long this has been here.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bannockburn Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 85 midfield wy frontage verge a stand alone bin is available could you place at adj bus stop it might prevent frequent build up of litter at this loc, 3rd March

item.title: Graffiti, 3rd March

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckenham Lane, Shortlands, Greater London

item.title: Rubbish bags and cardboard, 3rd March
item.description:
Left here overnight. By Plumstead Gardens entrance on Brookedene.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brookdene Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Metal left by tree, 3rd March
item.description:
No idea what it is but metal left by tree on Brookedene se18. Here overnight.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brookdene Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Animal fouling on bourne road bexley, 3rd March
item.description:
Res called today to state that there is animal fouling right outside her property which is 77 bourne road. Can this be pleased asap as she doesnt want her or her family stepping in this. This has happened before and she also reported this then and cleard it herself but she doesnt want to do that this time as she feels its not her responsibility.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 64, Bourne Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: O/s no 47, 3rd March
item.description:
Resident placed black bagged waste from bins on street
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
